attractions.name: Monas
attractions.seo_title: Monas Jakarta | National Monument & Merdeka Square Guide
attractions.description_short: Indonesia's towering National Monument crowns Merdeka Square and offers elevator views over the capital's sprawl.

attractions.name: Istiqlal Mosque
attractions.seo_title: Istiqlal Mosque Jakarta | Southeast Asia's Grandest Mosque
attractions.description_short: Southeast Asia's largest mosque stands opposite Jakarta Cathedral, symbolizing the nation's religious harmony.

attractions.name: Jakarta Cathedral
attractions.seo_title: Jakarta Cathedral | Neo-Gothic Church at Lapangan Banteng
attractions.description_short: This neo-Gothic Roman Catholic cathedral, rebuilt after fire, anchors the historic heart of colonial Batavia.

attractions.name: Kota Tua
attractions.seo_title: Kota Tua Jakarta | Old Town Dutch Heritage Walk
attractions.description_short: Kota Tua preserves Dutch-era warehouses and canals where Jakarta's trading past still feels alive on foot.

attractions.name: Fatahillah Square
attractions.seo_title: Fatahillah Square | Jakarta History Museum Plaza
attractions.description_short: Fatahillah Square is the lively plaza fronting the Jakarta History Museum with street performers and vintage bikes.

attractions.name: National Museum of Indonesia
attractions.seo_title: National Museum of Indonesia | Elephant Building Collections
attractions.description_short: Known as the Elephant Building, this museum holds one of the finest collections of Indonesian archaeology and ethnography.

attractions.name: Sunda Kelapa Harbor
attractions.seo_title: Sunda Kelapa Harbor | Historic Pinisi Port Jakarta
attractions.description_short: Pinisi schooners still load cargo at Sunda Kelapa, Jakarta's centuries-old port on the Ciliwung River mouth.

attractions.name: Taman Mini Indonesia Indah
attractions.seo_title: Taman Mini Indonesia Indah | Cultural Park East Jakarta
attractions.description_short: TMII showcases traditional houses from every province in a vast cultural park with museums and lake rides.

attractions.name: Senayan Park
attractions.seo_title: Senayan Park Jakarta | GBK Sports & Green Space
attractions.description_short: Senayan Park and the Gelora Bung Karno complex offer green space, sports venues, and events beside central Jakarta.

attractions.name: Glodok Chinatown
attractions.seo_title: Glodok Chinatown Jakarta | Markets & Temples Guide
attractions.description_short: Glodok is Jakarta's bustling Chinatown of temples, markets, and street food alleys northwest of Kota Tua.

attractions.name: Kraton Ngayogyakarta Hadiningrat
attractions.seo_title: Yogyakarta Kraton | Sultan's Palace & Javanese Court
attractions.description_short: The Sultan's palace remains a living court of Javanese culture with pavilions, gamelan, and royal heirlooms.

attractions.name: Taman Sari
attractions.seo_title: Taman Sari Water Castle | Royal Pools Yogyakarta
attractions.description_short: The Water Castle blends bathing pools, underground passages, and gardens built for the royal family.

attractions.name: Malioboro Street
attractions.seo_title: Malioboro Street | Yogyakarta Shopping & Street Life
attractions.description_short: Malioboro is Yogyakarta's main boulevard for batik shops, becak rides, and nightly street food.

attractions.name: Beringharjo Market
attractions.seo_title: Beringharjo Market | Historic Batik Bazaar Yogyakarta
attractions.description_short: Beringharjo Market is the city's oldest bazaar for batik, spices, and everyday Javanese goods.

attractions.name: Museum Sonobudoyo
attractions.seo_title: Museum Sonobudoyo | Javanese Art & Wayang Yogyakarta
attractions.description_short: Sonobudoyo displays Javanese wayang, keris, and ethnographic treasures steps from the northern alun-alun.

attractions.name: Sultan's Carriage Museum
attractions.seo_title: Sultan's Carriage Museum | Royal Kereta Collection
attractions.description_short: Museum Kereta houses ornate royal carriages and ceremonial transport from the Yogyakarta sultanate.

attractions.name: Kotagede
attractions.seo_title: Kotagede Yogyakarta | Silver Village & Old Mataram
attractions.description_short: Kotagede's silver workshops and mosque quarter preserve the legacy of the Mataram kingdom's first capital.

attractions.name: Alun-Alun Kidul
attractions.seo_title: Alun-Alun Kidul | Southern Royal Square Yogyakarta
attractions.description_short: The southern royal square is famous for twin banyan trees and a playful blindfolded walk tradition.

attractions.name: Ngasem Market
attractions.seo_title: Ngasem Market Yogyakarta | Bird Market Near Kraton
attractions.description_short: Ngasem bird market near the kraton is a colorful slice of local life with songbirds and handicrafts.

attractions.name: Gembira Loka Zoo
attractions.seo_title: Gembira Loka Zoo | Family Wildlife Park Yogyakarta
attractions.description_short: Gembira Loka Zoo pairs Indonesian wildlife exhibits with family-friendly gardens in east Yogyakarta.

attractions.name: Sacred Monkey Forest Sanctuary
attractions.seo_title: Ubud Monkey Forest | Sacred Sanctuary & Temples
attractions.description_short: Lush forest temples shelter hundreds of long-tailed macaques amid mossy statues and jungle paths.

attractions.name: Ubud Palace
attractions.seo_title: Ubud Palace | Puri Saren Agung & Balinese Dance
attractions.description_short: Puri Saren Agung hosts evening dance performances in the heart of Ubud's royal quarter.

attractions.name: Ubud Art Market
attractions.seo_title: Ubud Art Market | Batik & Handicrafts Shopping
attractions.description_short: Morning stalls overflow with batik, wood carvings, and souvenirs steps from the palace gates.

attractions.name: Pura Taman Saraswati
attractions.seo_title: Pura Taman Saraswati | Lotus Temple Ubud
attractions.description_short: This water temple honors the goddess of learning with a lotus pond and carved gates on Jalan Raya Ubud.

attractions.name: Campuhan Ridge Walk
attractions.seo_title: Campuhan Ridge Walk | Ubud Sunrise Trail Guide
attractions.description_short: An easy ridge trail above the Ayung River valley delivers classic Ubud rice-field panoramas at sunrise.

attractions.name: Blanco Renaissance Museum
attractions.seo_title: Blanco Renaissance Museum | Antonio Blanco Art Ubud
attractions.description_short: The flamboyant former studio of Antonio Blanco showcases his portraits amid hilltop gardens.

attractions.name: ARMA Museum
attractions.seo_title: ARMA Museum Ubud | Balinese Art & Culture
attractions.description_short: ARMA pairs classical and contemporary Balinese art with cultural workshops in a tranquil compound.

attractions.name: Neka Art Museum
attractions.seo_title: Neka Art Museum | Balinese Painting Collections Ubud
attractions.description_short: Neka surveys Balinese painting schools from wayang styles to modern masters in curated galleries.

attractions.name: The Yoga Barn
attractions.seo_title: The Yoga Barn Ubud | Yoga Retreats & Wellness
attractions.description_short: The Yoga Barn is Ubud's renowned wellness campus for daily classes, retreats, and plant-based dining.

attractions.name: Pura Dalem Agung
attractions.seo_title: Pura Dalem Agung | Padangtegal Temple Ubud
attractions.description_short: The main death temple of Padangtegal anchors the monkey forest with towering meru shrines.

attractions.name: Gedung Sate
attractions.seo_title: Gedung Sate Bandung | Iconic Dutch Colonial Landmark
attractions.description_short: Bandung's iconic government building with its satay-skewer spire is a landmark of Dutch Deco design.

attractions.name: Museum of the Asian-African Conference
attractions.seo_title: Asian-African Conference Museum | Bandung History
attractions.description_short: The museum preserves the 1955 Bandung Conference that shaped the Non-Aligned Movement.

attractions.name: Jalan Braga
attractions.seo_title: Jalan Braga | Art Deco Heritage Walk Bandung
attractions.description_short: Braga Street blends art deco facades, cafes, and galleries in Bandung's most walkable heritage lane.

attractions.name: Alun-alun Bandung
attractions.seo_title: Alun-alun Bandung | City Square & Grand Mosque
attractions.description_short: The city square faces the grand mosque and is a gathering place for evening snacks and family outings.

attractions.name: Great Mosque of Bandung
attractions.seo_title: Great Mosque of Bandung | Masjid Raya Landmark
attractions.description_short: Masjid Raya Bandung's soaring minarets dominate the skyline beside the central alun-alun.

attractions.name: Museum Geologi
attractions.seo_title: Museum Geologi Bandung | Volcanoes & Fossils
attractions.description_short: Indonesia's geology museum explains volcanoes and fossils that shape the surrounding highlands.

attractions.name: Kampung Daun
attractions.seo_title: Kampung Daun | Sundanese Dining Village Bandung
attractions.description_short: Kampung Daun serves Sundanese cuisine in bamboo villages with waterfalls on Bandung's green outskirts.

attractions.name: Saung Angklung Udjo
attractions.seo_title: Saung Angklung Udjo | Bamboo Orchestra Bandung
attractions.description_short: This cultural center stages interactive angklung bamboo orchestra performances for visitors.

attractions.name: Paris Van Java
attractions.seo_title: Paris Van Java | Hillside Shopping Bandung
attractions.description_short: Paris Van Java mall mixes upscale shopping with open-air architecture in Bandung's northern hills.

attractions.name: Jalan Riau
attractions.seo_title: Jalan Riau Bandung | Factory Outlet Shopping
attractions.description_short: Jalan Riau and adjacent factory outlets are Bandung's go-to strip for fashion and local factory sales.

attractions.name: House of Sampoerna
attractions.seo_title: House of Sampoerna | Surabaya Heritage Museum
attractions.description_short: A colonial cigarette factory turned museum tells Surabaya's trading history with guided tours.

attractions.name: Jalesveva Jayamahe Monument
attractions.seo_title: Jalesveva Jayamahe Monument | Surabaya Naval Landmark
attractions.description_short: The towering naval monument on the waterfront salutes Indonesia's maritime forces.

attractions.name: Cheng Ho Mosque
attractions.seo_title: Cheng Ho Mosque Surabaya | Chinese Architecture Mosque
attractions.description_short: This Chinese-style mosque commemorates Admiral Zheng He's voyages and Surabaya's Muslim Chinese community.

attractions.name: Taman Bungkul
attractions.seo_title: Taman Bungkul | Surabaya's Favorite City Park
attractions.description_short: Bungkul Park is a beloved urban green space for skateboarding, street food, and evening hangouts.

attractions.name: Tunjungan Street
attractions.seo_title: Tunjungan Street | Heritage Boulevard Surabaya
attractions.description_short: Tunjungan Street lines up heritage buildings, malls, and cafes in Surabaya's commercial core.

attractions.name: Ciputra World
attractions.seo_title: Ciputra World Surabaya | Modern Mall & Dining
attractions.description_short: Ciputra World anchors west Surabaya with shopping, dining, and contemporary architecture.

attractions.name: Wonorejo Mangrove
attractions.seo_title: Wonorejo Mangrove | Coastal Eco Walk Surabaya
attractions.description_short: Boardwalks through Wonorejo mangroves offer birdwatching and calm escapes near the coast.

attractions.name: Suramadu Bridge
attractions.seo_title: Suramadu Bridge | Java-Madura Crossing
attractions.description_short: Suramadu links Java and Madura across the Madura Strait in a dramatic cable-stayed span.

attractions.name: Arab Quarter (Sunan Ampel area)
attractions.seo_title: Surabaya Arab Quarter | Ampel Mosque & Souks
attractions.description_short: The Ampel quarter around Sunan Ampel Mosque is Surabaya's historic Arab district of souks and dates.

attractions.name: Submarine Monument (Monkasel)
attractions.seo_title: Monkasel Submarine Museum | KRI Pasopati Surabaya
attractions.description_short: Monkasel displays the retired KRI Pasopati submarine as a museum on the riverfront.

attractions.name: Tugu Monument
attractions.seo_title: Tugu Monument Malang | City Center Landmark
attractions.description_short: Malang's signature roundabout monument marks the city center and Dutch-era urban planning.

attractions.name: Kampung Warna Warni Jodipan
attractions.seo_title: Kampung Warna Warni Jodipan | Rainbow Village Malang
attractions.description_short: Rainbow-painted alleys and bridges turned Jodipan into one of Indonesia's most photogenic villages.

attractions.name: Malang City Square
attractions.seo_title: Malang City Square | Alun-alun & Evening Food
attractions.description_short: The alun-alun pairs a grand mosque with evening food stalls and a relaxed local atmosphere.

attractions.name: Ijen Boulevard
attractions.seo_title: Ijen Boulevard Malang | Dutch Colonial Heritage Walk
attractions.description_short: Ijen Boulevard showcases preserved Dutch colonial villas shaded by flowering trees.

attractions.name: Museum Brawijaya
attractions.seo_title: Museum Brawijaya Malang | Military History East Java
attractions.description_short: Brawijaya Museum documents East Java's military history with armor and independence-era exhibits.

attractions.name: Singosari Temple
attractions.seo_title: Singosari Temple | Hindu Ruins Near Malang
attractions.description_short: Singosari temple ruins recall the 13th-century Hindu kingdom that preceded Majapahit.

attractions.name: Klenteng Eng An Kiong
attractions.seo_title: Eng An Kiong Temple | Malang Chinese Heritage
attractions.description_short: Eng An Kiong is Malang's historic Chinese temple with ornate roofs near the city square.

attractions.name: Senaputra Park
attractions.seo_title: Senaputra Park Malang | Family Green Space
attractions.description_short: Senaputra Park offers family recreation and green lawns on the eastern side of Malang.

attractions.name: Balai Kota Malang
attractions.seo_title: Balai Kota Malang | Historic City Hall
attractions.description_short: Malang's white city hall faces the Tugu and reflects Dutch civic architecture.

attractions.name: Malang Tempo Doeloe area
attractions.seo_title: Malang Tempo Doeloe | Heritage Cafes & Shophouses
attractions.description_short: Lanes around Ijen and Trunojoyo evoke 'tempo doeloe' Malang with cafes in restored shophouses.

attractions.name: Maimun Palace
attractions.seo_title: Maimun Palace Medan | Deli Sultanate Landmark
attractions.description_short: The yellow Maimun Palace blends Malay, Indian, and European styles as a symbol of Deli sultanate.

attractions.name: Great Mosque of Medan
attractions.seo_title: Great Mosque of Medan | Masjid Raya Landmark
attractions.description_short: Masjid Raya Medan rises beside the palace with Middle Eastern-inspired domes and minarets.

attractions.name: Tjong A Fie Mansion
attractions.seo_title: Tjong A Fie Mansion | Historic Medan Merchant Home
attractions.description_short: This restored Chinese mansion tells the story of a Medan tycoon amid carved courtyards.

attractions.name: Merdeka Walk
attractions.seo_title: Merdeka Walk Medan | Pedestrian Food Street
attractions.description_short: Merdeka Walk is Medan's pedestrian dining promenade with local snacks and evening buzz.

attractions.name: Tip Top Restaurant
attractions.seo_title: Tip Top Restaurant Medan | Colonial-Era Dining
attractions.description_short: Tip Top has served ice cream and Dutch-influenced dishes from a colonial-era storefront since 1934.

attractions.name: Vihara Gunung Timur
attractions.seo_title: Vihara Gunung Timur | Buddhist Temple Medan
attractions.description_short: This Buddhist temple complex features a multi-tiered pagoda near Medan's multicultural center.

attractions.name: Sri Mariamman Temple
attractions.seo_title: Sri Mariamman Temple Medan | Tamil Hindu Temple
attractions.description_short: Medan's Tamil Hindu temple bursts with painted gopuram detail in the city's Indian quarter.

attractions.name: Rahmat International Wildlife Museum
attractions.seo_title: Rahmat Wildlife Museum Medan | Global Taxidermy Collection
attractions.description_short: Rahmat's wildlife museum displays taxidermy dioramas from around the world in a modern hall.

attractions.name: Medan Post Office
attractions.seo_title: Medan Post Office | Colonial Heritage Building
attractions.description_short: The heritage post office building anchors colonial architecture along Medan's main axis.

attractions.name: Kesawan Historic District
attractions.seo_title: Kesawan Historic District | Old Medan Commercial Quarter
attractions.description_short: Kesawan preserves shophouses and the old commercial spine of Dutch-era Medan.

attractions.name: Fort Rotterdam
attractions.seo_title: Fort Rotterdam Makassar | Dutch Harbor Fortress
attractions.description_short: Dutch Fort Rotterdam guards the harbor with museums inside thick coral-stone walls.

attractions.name: Losari Beach
attractions.seo_title: Losari Beach Makassar | Sunset Promenade Guide
attractions.description_short: Losari Beach promenade is famous for sunset views and pisang epe grilled banana snacks.

attractions.name: Trans Studio Makassar
attractions.seo_title: Trans Studio Makassar | Indoor Theme Park
attractions.description_short: Indonesia's indoor theme park at Trans Studio Mall packs rides and shows under one roof.

attractions.name: Paotere Harbor
attractions.seo_title: Paotere Harbor | Traditional Pinisi Port Makassar
attractions.description_short: Paotere still bustles with pinisi boats loading goods beside traditional Bugis sailors.

attractions.name: Somba Opu Cultural Village
attractions.seo_title: Somba Opu Cultural Village | Gowa Kingdom Heritage
attractions.description_short: Somba Opu reconstructs Gowa kingdom forts and houses to showcase South Sulawesi heritage.

attractions.name: Akkarena Beach
attractions.seo_title: Akkarena Beach Makassar | Seafood & Sand
attractions.description_short: Akkarena Beach offers a cleaner stretch of sand and seafood warungs east of the city center.

attractions.name: Mandala Monument
attractions.seo_title: Mandala Monument Makassar | Liberation Memorial
attractions.description_short: The Mandala Monument honors liberation struggles with a soaring pillar and museum.

attractions.name: Museum La Galigo
attractions.seo_title: Museum La Galigo | Bugis Maritime Culture
attractions.description_short: La Galigo Museum presents Bugis maritime culture and the epic literature of South Sulawesi.

attractions.name: Karebosi Link
attractions.seo_title: Karebosi Link | Downtown Park Makassar
attractions.description_short: Karebosi Link is a downtown park and tunnel plaza connecting Makassar's main squares.

attractions.name: CPI Mosque (99 Domes Mosque)
attractions.seo_title: 99 Domes Mosque Makassar | Al Markas Al Islami
attractions.description_short: The 99 Domes Mosque dazzles with golden domes and modern Islamic architecture on the waterfront.

attractions.name: Labuan Bajo Waterfront Marina
attractions.seo_title: Labuan Bajo Marina | Komodo Gateway Waterfront
attractions.description_short: The marina waterfront is the jumping-off point for Komodo boat trips and golden-hour harbor views.

attractions.name: Sylvia Hill
attractions.seo_title: Sylvia Hill Labuan Bajo | Panoramic Bay Viewpoint
attractions.description_short: Sylvia Hill viewpoint overlooks the bay and islands that stretch toward Komodo National Park.

attractions.name: Paradise Bar
attractions.seo_title: Paradise Bar Labuan Bajo | Harbor Sunset Hangout
attractions.description_short: Paradise Bar is a laid-back sunset spot for drinks above the harbor after island day trips.

attractions.name: Batu Cermin Cave
attractions.seo_title: Batu Cermin Cave | Mirror Cave Near Labuan Bajo
attractions.description_short: Mirror Cave shines when sunlight reflects off crystal walls in a short guided walk near town.

attractions.name: Rangko Cave
attractions.seo_title: Rangko Cave | Swimming Cave Pool Flores
attractions.description_short: Rangko Cave hides a saltwater pool for swimming inside a limestone chamber lit by openings above.

attractions.name: Waecicu Beach
attractions.seo_title: Waecicu Beach | Calm Shore Near Labuan Bajo
attractions.description_short: Waecicu Beach offers calm shallows and island views a short drive from Labuan Bajo.

attractions.name: St. Angela Church
attractions.seo_title: St. Angela Church Labuan Bajo | Hilltop Parish
attractions.description_short: St. Angela Church crowns a hill with sea breezes and a quiet perch above the fishing town.

attractions.name: Puncak Waringin
attractions.seo_title: Puncak Waringin | Labuan Bajo Lookout Point
attractions.description_short: Puncak Waringin is a favorite lookout under a giant waringin tree for sweeping harbor photos.

attractions.name: Local Fish Market
attractions.seo_title: Labuan Bajo Fish Market | Morning Harbor Catch
attractions.description_short: Morning fish auctions and waterfront grills show the daily catch that fuels Komodo fleet crews.

attractions.name: Komodo National Park Visitor Center
attractions.seo_title: Komodo National Park Visitor Center | Dragon Park Gateway
attractions.description_short: The visitor center orients travelers to Komodo dragon habitats, trekking rules, and park fees.

attractions.name: Mangkunegaran Palace
attractions.seo_title: Mangkunegaran Palace | Solo Royal Court & Gamelan
attractions.description_short: Pura Mangkunegaran preserves Javanese court dance, silver, and gamelan in central Solo.

attractions.name: Kasunanan Palace
attractions.seo_title: Kasunanan Palace Solo | Surakarta Kraton Guide
attractions.description_short: The Kasunanan Surakarta palace remains the cultural heart of the Sunanate with museum halls.

attractions.name: Laweyan Batik Village
attractions.seo_title: Laweyan Batik Village | Solo Batik Workshops
attractions.description_short: Laweyan is a living batik neighborhood where workshops still dye cloth in traditional patterns.

attractions.name: Pasar Gede
attractions.seo_title: Pasar Gede Solo | Historic Central Market
attractions.description_short: Pasar Gede's grand market hall sells spices, produce, and snacks under a colonial roof.

attractions.name: Triwindu Market
attractions.seo_title: Triwindu Market | Solo Antiques & Curios
attractions.description_short: Triwindu Market is Solo's antiques bazaar for batik, puppets, and vintage curios.

attractions.name: Klewer Market
attractions.seo_title: Klewer Market Solo | Batik Textile Bazaar
attractions.description_short: Klewer Market specializes in batik sarongs and fabric at bargain prices near the palaces.

attractions.name: Balekambang Park
attractions.seo_title: Balekambang Park | Family Lakeside Park Solo
attractions.description_short: Balekambang Park offers lakes, tree-lined paths, and weekend family recreation in Solo.

attractions.name: Danar Hadi Batik Museum
attractions.seo_title: Danar Hadi Batik Museum | Premier Batik Collection Solo
attractions.description_short: Danar Hadi displays prized batik collections from court cloths to contemporary pieces.

attractions.name: Gladag
attractions.seo_title: Gladag Solo | Historic Square Near Palaces
attractions.description_short: Gladag square buzzes with becak, street vendors, and palace proximity in old Surakarta.

attractions.name: Bengawan Solo Park
attractions.seo_title: Bengawan Solo Park | Riverside Green Space
attractions.description_short: This riverside park celebrates the legendary Solo River with paths, bridges, and open lawns.

adventure_locations.name: Borobudur Temple
adventure_locations.description_short: The world's largest Buddhist temple rises in concentric terraces of carved stupas at dawn mist.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Borobudur Temple | UNESCO Buddhist Monument Java

adventure_locations.name: Mount Bromo
adventure_locations.description_short: Bromo's sea of sand and smoking crater draw sunrise jeep convoys across the Tengger caldera.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Mount Bromo Sunrise | Tengger Caldera Adventure

adventure_locations.name: Ijen Crater
adventure_locations.description_short: Night hikes reveal blue sulfur flames and turquoise acid lake at Kawah Ijen volcano.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Ijen Crater Blue Fire | Kawah Ijen Trek Guide

adventure_locations.name: Komodo National Park
adventure_locations.description_short: Komodo dragons roam islands of savanna and reef, accessible by liveaboard from Labuan Bajo.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Komodo National Park | Dragons & Island Hopping

adventure_locations.name: Raja Ampat
adventure_locations.description_short: Raja Ampat's karst isles and coral reefs rank among the richest marine habitats on Earth.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Raja Ampat Islands | World-Class Diving & Reefs

adventure_locations.name: Lake Toba
adventure_locations.description_short: Vast Lake Toba fills a supervolcano caldera with Batak villages on Samosir Island.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Lake Toba | Samosir Island & Batak Culture

adventure_locations.name: Tumpak Sewu Waterfall
adventure_locations.description_short: Tumpak Sewu cascades like a curtain of waterfalls in a lush amphitheater near Lumajang.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Tumpak Sewu Waterfall | Semeru Region Cascade

adventure_locations.name: Bunaken National Park
adventure_locations.description_short: Bunaken's wall dives drop into coral gardens minutes by boat from Manado.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Bunaken National Park | Manado Diving Paradise

adventure_locations.name: Tanjung Puting National Park
adventure_locations.description_short: Houseboat cruises on the Sekonyer River bring orangutans and proboscis monkeys into view.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Tanjung Puting | Orangutan River Safari Borneo

adventure_locations.name: Wae Rebo Village
adventure_locations.description_short: Wae Rebo's cone-shaped mbaru niang houses sit in cloud forest on a remote Flores ridge.
adventure_locations.seo_title: Wae Rebo Village | Traditional Flores Highland Settlement
